author: Gustavo de Aguiar Martins

interpretation.boundary: This matrix aggregates public sanitized evidence; it does not expose raw private local logs or commercial tuning.
interpretation.purpose: Expose PNVA no-tick behavior as an entity-by-heuristic matrix.
interpretation.sovereignty: A no-tick decision is stronger when suppression, execution, proof, authority and risk are attributable to a concrete entity.

recommendations: Use this matrix to select the next entity-level hardening target.
Keep native entity rows clean: no missing proof, no missing catalog, no low-authority strong decision.
Treat canonical legacy warnings as migration debt until all production events are emitted natively.
